description_long: This object is a compact, metallic machine gun with a sleek, angular body and a prominent barrel extending from the front. The main receiver is polygonal and reflective, with a box magazine protruding vertically beneath the center. The stock is rigid and geometric, featuring a flat, angular buttplate for shoulder support. The barrel is cylindrical and smooth, lacking visible cooling fins or suppressors, and terminates in a small muzzle. There are minimal external attachments, and the overall design is streamlined with sharp edges and a glossy finish. The iron sights are simple and fixed, with a small front post and a rear notch integrated into the top of the receiver.
description: A compact, angular metallic machine gun with a glossy finish, box magazine, and rigid geometric stock. Features a smooth cylindrical barrel and simple fixed iron sights.
description_view_0: The machine gun is seen from the front, showing the narrow cylindrical barrel and the slim profile of the receiver and stock.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the polygonal receiver, box magazine, rigid angular stock, and the smooth cylindrical barrel extending forward.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the flat, angular buttplate of the stock and the alignment of the magazine and barrel along the central axis.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, displaying the same angular receiver, box magazine, and rigid stock, with the barrel extending to the left.
attribute_stock_design: fixed angular metal stock with flat buttplate
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple fixed rear notch and front post
